title: Fix compilation error causing production deployment failure

requirements.text: Identify and fix the Motoko compilation error in backend/main.mo that is preventing successful deployment to the Internet Computer network. Ensure the actor compiles cleanly with no type errors, missing imports, or syntax issues.

quotes: The deployment error for Version 24 means the build failed when trying to go live on the Internet Computer network. This can happen due to a compilation error in the generated code.

acceptanceCriteria: All existing CRUD operations for cattle, customers, deliveries, and milk production remain functional
The canister deploys successfully to the Internet Computer network

requirements.text: Verify that the Add Customer and Add Cattle form submission bug fixes (which call backend mutations and update the UI without a page reload) are preserved and working correctly after the compilation fix.

quotes: the fix for adding customers and cattle should now be working

acceptanceCriteria: Submitting the Add Customer form successfully calls the backend mutation and updates the customer list without a full page reload
Submitting the Add Cattle form successfully calls the backend mutation and updates the cattle list without a full page reload
No double-submission occurs due to the existing ref-based guard in CattleForm and CustomerForm

constraints: Do not change the frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or any files under frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve all existing backend data model types and CRUD API surface — no breaking changes to the actor interface
nonGoals: Changing the visual design or UI layout
